$comment: Quill branding + theme config. Edit this file in-place on a running instance — the next page load picks up the changes (no rebuild, no restart). For PWA shortcuts already installed on a device, the OS-cached launcher icon won't update until you reinstall the PWA.
name: Quill
defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
$themesExample: Add as many entries as you want. Each theme overrides every CSS custom property the app uses. category is 'dark' or 'light'. swatches is a 3-color preview shown in the Settings picker. The 'cordfuse' entry below is a working example — delete it or replace it with your brand.
